Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AccountController
    REST controller responsible for user account management operations.
    ApiController
    REST controller responsible for authentication and user registration.
    Attachment
    Represents metadata describing an email attachment.
    AuthResponse
    Response object returned after authentication-related operations.
    DeleteAccountRequest
    Request object used for account deletion operations.
    EmailAddress
    Entity representing an email account configuration associated with a user.
    EmailAddressController
    REST controller responsible for managing email accounts associated with users.
    EmailAddressDTO
    Data transfer object containing email account configuration details.
    EmailAddressRepository
    Repository responsible for persistence operations related to EmailAddress entities.
    EmailAddressService
    Service responsible for managing user email account configurations.
    EmailCryptoService
    Service responsible for encrypting and decrypting email account passwords.
    EmailMessage
    Represents a complete email message returned by the application.
    ImapMail
    Entity representing an email message synchronized from an IMAP server.
    ImapMailRepository
    Repository responsible for persistence operations related to ImapMail entities.
    JwtFilter
    JWT authentication filter responsible for extracting and validating JSON Web Tokens from incoming HTTP requests.
    JwtService
    Service responsible for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
    LoginRequest
    Request object used during user authentication.
    Mail
    Entity representing a suggested recipient relationship used for email auto-completion and recipient recommendations.
    MailController
    REST controller responsible for email management operations.
    MailRepository
    Repository responsible for persistence operations related to Mail entities.
    MailService
    Service responsible for email synchronization, retrieval and mailbox management operations.
    MoveMailRequest
    Request object used for moving an email message between folders.
    PasswordChangeRequest
    Request object used for password change operations.
    PasswordEncodeService
    Service responsible for password hashing and verification.
    QuantumMailApplication
    Entry point of the QuantumMail application.
    RegisterRequest
    Request object used during user registration.
    SecurityConfig
    Spring Security configuration class responsible for configuring authentication, authorization, session management and CORS settings.
    SendEmailService
    Service responsible for composing and sending email messages through user-configured SMTP accounts.
    User
    Entity representing an application user.
    UserRepository
    Repository responsible for persistence operations related to User entities.
    UserService
    Service responsible for user account management and authentication.
